test.command: uv run pytest tests/ -m 'not integration_local and not integration_provider' -x -q
test.observation: 1014 passed, 1 skipped in 63.18s. All non-integration tests pass.

lint.command: uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
lint.observation: ruff check: All checks passed. ruff format: 217 files already formatted. One file (tests/test_cross_schema_consistency.py) was reformatted during validation.

appliedUpdates.description: Added ty 0.0.x versioning note, ty environment.python-version config format, and Click CliRunner mix_stderr incompatibility to environment.md

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the backend-worker SKILL.md verification commands to use 'uv run ty check src/grist_mill/' instead of 'uv run ty check .'. AGENTS.md explicitly warns that 'ty check .' on the full repo will fail due to pre-existing legacy code in bench/, scripts/, optimization/, and task_generator/.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reported by 3 reviewers (m1-project-scaffolding, m1-artifact-schema-and-registry, m1-cli-entrypoint). Workers consistently had to deviate from the skill's verification step to scope type checking to src/grist_mill/.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an exception to the 'Never catch bare Exception' rule for cleanup-guarantee patterns (try/finally or try/except+re-raise). The BaseHarness._run method legitimately catches bare Exception to guarantee env.cleanup() is called.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reported by m1-abstract-interfaces reviewer. The BaseHarness._run method uses 'except Exception:' as part of a cleanup-guarantee pattern (exception is re-raised). This is correct engineering but violates the blanket AGENTS.md rule.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the architecture diagram to match actual implementation: use flat module files (interfaces.py, config.py) instead of subdirectories (interfaces/, config/). Alternatively, note that the diagram is aspirational and the flat module convention takes precedence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reported by 3 reviewers (m1-abstract-interfaces, m1-config-system, m1-telemetry-schema). The AGENTS.md architecture diagram shows interfaces/, config/, telemetry/ as subdirectories but the actual implementation uses flat modules: interfaces.py, config.py, schemas/telemetry.py. This inconsistency may confuse future workers.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the TC001/TC003 ruff rule ignores in pyproject.toml. These rules enforce using typing-extensions types over stdlib for broad compatibility but are ignored for pragmatic reasons.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reported by m1-config-system reviewer. pyproject.toml ignore list includes TC001 and TC003 without documentation in AGENTS.md.

rejectedObservations.observation: Telemetry module lives in schemas/telemetry.py rather than top-level telemetry/ as shown in architecture diagram
services.yaml already includes test files in test_grist_mill command
The config module is a flat file (config.py) vs AGENTS.md showing config/ directory
Worker correctly scoped ty check to src/grist_mill/
Pydantic v2 conventions correctly followed (ConfigDict, str_strip_whitespace)
Artifact class not a true Pydantic model (isinstance check limitation)
CLI override routing passes full cli_args to each section
